name: The Phone Company — Contact Center AI
client_name: The Phone Company Contact Center AI
scope_summary: Phase 2 building on existing CX Platform. AI-powered contact center automation with Copilot for Agents, agent assist for 800 reps, and call analytics. Includes Responsible AI governance.

profile.ai_recommendation_text: Phase 2 expansion combining D365 Contact Center with AI. Strong client relationship. AI estimate accuracy condition applies. Some satisfaction risk on Phase 1 (change management) — preventive actions required.
ai_conditions: Change management plan with contact center managers as champions
AI model acceptance criteria with measurable agent productivity thresholds
Apply VanArsdel weekly demos pattern for agent assist

score_dimensions: Alignment to company priority pillars (Cloud, AI, Security, Dynamics, Data)
Inverse risk: solution complexity, deal size, vendor dependency
Scope completeness, exclusions, assumptions, acceptance criteria
Historical success rate on comparable engagements
Confidence in effort estimates based on complexity and comparables
Regulatory and compliance overhead (HIPAA, GDPR, SOX, FFIEC)
Reuse of playbooks, SOW templates, and delivery accelerators
Partner/subcontractor % — impact on margin and delivery control
Monthly ACR generated — strategic value to Microsoft ecosystem
